html:
Exclusive to:

Snake Bone Soup is a Crock Pot dish introduced in the Hamlet DLC. The recipe calls for 2 Snake Bones and a Meat value of 2. It takes 20 seconds to cook, and takes 10 days to spoil.

The recipe has a higher priority than Monster Lasagna, so it is possible to put 2 Monster Meat in the Crock Pot instead of normal Meat.

Prerequisites

  • Requires: 
  • Requires: 

Recipe

×2

×2

Examples

×2

×2

Tips

  • Not being a very filling food item, the Snake Bone Soup is best consumed if the player needs to heal and gain a small amount of .
  • The player can choose to make this food whenever they need to, as Snake Bones don't spoil.

Trivia

  • During the Pig Fiesta event, Snake Bone Soup takes on a more festive appearance.

'''Snake Bone Soup''' is a [[Crock Pot]] dish introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. The recipe calls for 2 [[Snake Bone]]s and a [[Meat]] value of 2. It takes 20 seconds to cook, and takes 10 [[Day-Night Cycle|days]] to [[spoil]].

The recipe has a higher priority than [[Monster Lasagna]], so it is possible to put 2 [[Monster Meat]] in the [[Crock Pot]] instead of normal [[Meat]].__NOTOC__
== Prerequisites ==
* Requires: [[File:Snake Bone.png|link=Snake Bone]]
* Requires: [[File:Meats Crock Pot.png|link=Meats]]

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Snake Bone
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Meats
|count2 = 2
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Snake Bone Soup}}

== Examples ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Snake Bone
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Monster Meat
|count2 = 2
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Snake Bone Soup}}

=={{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
*Not being a very filling food item, the Snake Bone Soup is best consumed if the player needs to heal and gain a small amount of {{sanity}}.
*The player can choose to make this food whenever they need to, as Snake Bones don't spoil. 

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
[[File:Snake Bone Soup (Pig Fiesta).png|right]]
* During the [[Pig Fiesta]] event, Snake Bone Soup takes on a more festive appearance.
